kunculu-akit-lezzet.name: Xəbərlər
instructions: 1. Roast the sesame in 10 minutes jealous fire in the lean pan.
2. Add and mix on it.
3. Add walnuts to it and add snow.
4. Aluminum foil cool on oven tray.
5. Pour the mixture with sesame in thin layer.
6. Cook for 10 minutes in the oven set to 175 degrees.
7. Remove sesame from the oven without burning.
8. Reverse on another tray.
9. slice and serve the cold.

x-cookies.name: X Cookies
instructions: In a medium bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Cut in butter using a pastry blender, or pinching between your fingers. Add egg, and mix until a dough forms. It may take a couple of minutes of mixing. When the dough starts to hold together, turn it out onto a floured surface and knead briefly. Shape dough into a long roll, wrap, and set aside.

Place the figs, almonds, apricot preserves, raisins, orange peel, chocolate, rum, and cinnamon into a food processor or blender. Process until finely chopped. If the fruit is hard, it may be soaked in boiling water to soften for 15 minutes before processing.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). In a small bowl, mix together the remaining egg and milk to make an egg wash.

Divide dough into 12 pieces. On a lightly floured surface, roll each piece out into a 3x12 inch rectangle. Brush the strips of dough lightly with egg wash. Place a strip of the fruit mixture lengthwise down the center of each piece of dough, and fold the edges over. Roll gently to seal. This will make the filled tube of dough a little bit longer. Cut each tube into 3 inch pieces. Make a one inch long slit with a knife down the center of each cut end. Spread the ends out to form an X shape. Place cookies 2 inches apart onto lightly greased cookie sheets.

Bake for 15 to 20 minutes in the preheated oven, or until the edges are golden. Allow cookies to cool on the tray for at least 5 minutes, so they will not be too delicate, before removing to wire racks to cool completely. Dust with confectioners' sugar when cool.

xau-xau-rice-teleculinaria.name: Xau Xau Rice
instructions: In a pot, put the salted water and let it boil. Add the rice, stir, cover the pot and let cook for 10 minutes. Remove from the fire, drain and reserve.
In a bowl, beat the eggs. Take a frying pan to the fire, put 1 tablespoon of oil, add the egg shakes, let cook, stir always, until the eggs are cooked. Remove from the fire and reserve.
In another frying pan, add the remaining oil and saute the bacon, add the pepper, washed, seed cleaned and cubed, and the peas. Season with salt and pepper, stir and let cook for 5 minutes.
De seguida, acrescente o arroz e os ovos mexidos, saltei tudo muito bem, junte o molho de soja e envolva. Retire do lume e sirva de seguida.

xerotigana-of-crete-argiro.name: Xerotigana Of Crete

ingredients.item: Durum flour as it lifts about 4 fl.
A little extra flour for opening a leaf
Durum flour as it lifts about 4 fl.
A little extra flour for opening a leaf

instructions: In a bowl, add all the liquid ingredients and mix.
Gradually, stirring first with a spoon, add the flour until dough is formed.
Then with your hands, knead with flour until the bowl is completely cleaned from the rest of the dough.
The dough must be stable without sticking to the hands.
Place it in a bowl and cover and let it rest for at least 30 minutes.
Cut pieces of dough and ideally spread thin leaf by adding flour to the pasta machine.
Start with thick leaf and gradually reduce the thickness by sprinkle with flour.
When very thin, cut the leaf into thin strips with a leaf peach to make lace finishes.
Heat a lot of olive oil in a shallow pot in moderate intensity. The strong fire will give them dark color and bitter taste.
His wrapping process, shaped like a rose, is a little complicated and requires experience. With the help of a fork, wrap the dough and dip in the hot oil by turning quickly on a roll around the fork.
Alternatively you can give simple shape by hand.
Fry little until the dough is puffed and slightly blonded.
A few of them are fried and put on absorbent paper to drain.
Fast frying in moderate intensity makes them very crispy and blond in color.
After frying them all, let them cool completely and dry.
Then we add them by pouring them with the cold dense honey syrup.
Mix all the ingredients sesame cinnamon nuts and sprinkle the Cretan dry fry of the wedding.

xerotigana-without-eggs-from-paros-argir.name: Xerotigana Without Eggs From Paros
xerotigana-without-eggs-from-paros-argir.original_name: Ξεροτήγανα χωρίς αυγά από την Πάρο

ingredients.item: 2 small fruity oranges (their juice and zest)
1/4 cup olive oil or sunflower oil
Soft olive oil or sunflower oil for frying
A lot of coarsely chopped nut for sprinkled or roasted sesame
2 small fruity oranges (their juice and zest)
1/4 cup olive oil or sunflower oil
Soft olive oil or sunflower oil for frying
A lot of coarsely chopped nut for sprinkled or roasted sesame

instructions: Place all the ingredients in a bowl and work until we have a dough that is supple.
If necessary, add a few drops of water to achieve this.
Allow to rest for about 30 minutes.
We take pieces of dough and spread very thin leaf with the cook on a floured surface.
Cut it into long stripes 2 cm wide and 20 cm long.

xinomyzithra-with-garlic-yogurt-and-roas.name: Xinomyzithra With Garlic Yogurt And Roasted Cherry Tomatoes
xinomyzithra-with-garlic-yogurt-and-roas.original_name: Ξινομυζήθρα με σκορδάτο γιαούρτι και ψητά ντοματίνια
instructions: Wash the tomatoes, dry them and put them in a baking pan.
Add the garlic, thyme, oregano, olive oil, vinegar, salt and pepper.
Mix and Bake in a preheated oven at 2003
Let them cool down and make some broths on the baking pan.
Press the garlic cloves and take their baked flesh.
Transfer to a bowl and melt with a fork.
Add the yogurt and 2 tablespoons of the liquids and mix.
Finally, we incorporate the sour-skinned trinkets by mixing.
Spread the cheese mixture on a plate and make the center a hollow, where we put the tomatoes.
Garnish with some pesto and pour some liquids from the baking pan.
Serve with baked pies or toasted bread.

xiuropaspalas-argiro.name: Xiuropaspalas
instructions: Choose pork with fat (wine pan) and cut it into bites.
Place it in a small pot without added oil and leave it on medium heat to drink all its liquids.
When dried, add the wine and let the pot dry completely again.
Fill in hot water as much as cover the pork and let it boil until it melts in the mouth for about an hour. To the end, add salt and pepper.
Heat in a pot and heat the olive oil on medium heat and bake the flour continuously stirring with a wooden spoon or wire until golden.
Lower the volume completely and gradually add warm broth from the pork to the roasted flour, stirring with the wire to dissolve.
Continue stirring until the mixture thickens and becomes a thin cream.
Finally we throw the meat in.
Try and correct salt and pepper.
Serve with some fried onion and fresh oregano.
